script.arcTitle: From England’s Lead to Argentina’s Turnaround
script.openingLine: England meet Argentina in the semi-final at Atlanta Stadium.

moments.spokenLine: England meet Argentina in the semi-final at Atlanta Stadium.
moments.explainer: The semi-final begins with both sides level and the whole contest ahead.

moments.spokenLine: England win a confirmed corner. The count is 1–0.
moments.explainer: England make the first set-piece mark of the match.

moments.spokenLine: Argentina win a confirmed corner. The count is 1–1.
moments.explainer: Argentina answer, bringing the corner count level.

moments.spokenLine: Elliot ANDERSON is shown a card for England.
moments.explainer: England’s first confirmed booking adds an early disciplinary note.

moments.spokenLine: Lisandro MARTINEZ is shown a card for Argentina.
moments.explainer: Argentina now have a confirmed booking as well.

moments.spokenLine: England 0–0 Argentina at the interval.
moments.explainer: Neither side has broken through before half-time.

moments.spokenLine: Argentina win a confirmed corner. The count is 1–2.
moments.explainer: Argentina move ahead in the corner count after the interval.

moments.spokenLine: Cristian ROMERO is shown a card for Argentina.
moments.explainer: Argentina receive another confirmed booking.

moments.spokenLine: Anthony GORDON scores for England. The score moves to 1–0.
moments.explainer: England break the deadlock and take the lead in the semi-final.

moments.spokenLine: Argentina win a confirmed corner. The count is 1–3.
moments.explainer: Argentina respond with another corner after falling behind.

moments.spokenLine: Argentina win a confirmed corner. The count is 1–4.
moments.explainer: The corner count continues to tilt toward Argentina.

moments.spokenLine: Argentina win a confirmed corner. The count is 1–5.
moments.explainer: Another corner underlines Argentina’s growing set-piece pressure.

moments.spokenLine: Argentina drive a sustained spell: 4 shots and 22 dangerous actions.
moments.explainer: This is a concentrated attacking passage from Argentina.

moments.spokenLine: Argentina drive another spell: 4 shots and 21 dangerous actions.
moments.explainer: Argentina maintain the pressure across a second ten-minute passage.

moments.spokenLine: Argentina win a confirmed corner. The count is 1–6.
moments.explainer: Argentina’s pressure produces another corner before the equaliser.

moments.spokenLine: Enzo FERNANDEZ scores for Argentina. The score moves to 1–1.
moments.explainer: Argentina turn their sustained pressure into an equaliser.

moments.spokenLine: Lautaro MARTINEZ scores for Argentina. The score moves to 1–2.
moments.explainer: Argentina complete the turnaround and move in front.

moments.spokenLine: Rodrigo DE PAUL is shown a card for Argentina.
moments.explainer: Argentina’s late lead comes with another confirmed booking.

moments.spokenLine: England drive a sustained spell: 1 shot and 22 dangerous actions.
moments.explainer: England produce a late attacking surge while trailing.

moments.spokenLine: England 1–2 Argentina.
moments.explainer: Argentina finish ahead and win the semi-final.

chapters.text: At kick-off, England meet Argentina in the semi-final at Atlanta Stadium.
In the 6th minute, England win a confirmed corner. The corner count is 1–0.
In the 23rd minute, Argentina win a confirmed corner. The corner count is 1–1.
In the 37th minute, Elliot ANDERSON is shown a card for England.
In the 42nd minute, Lisandro MARTINEZ is shown a card for Argentina.
At half-time, England 0–0 Argentina.
In the 47th minute, Argentina win a confirmed corner. The corner count is 1–2.
In the 51st minute, Cristian ROMERO is shown a card for Argentina.
In the 55th minute, Anthony GORDON scores for England. The score moves to 1–0.
In the 56th minute, Argentina win a confirmed corner. The corner count is 1–3.
In the 66th minute, Argentina win a confirmed corner. The corner count is 1–4.
In the 67th minute, Argentina win a confirmed corner. The corner count is 1–5.
Between the 60th and 70th minutes, Argentina drive a sustained spell: 4 shots and 22 dangerous actions.
Between the 70th and 80th minutes, Argentina drive another spell: 4 shots and 21 dangerous actions.
In the 84th minute, Argentina win a confirmed corner. The corner count is 1–6.
In the 85th minute, Enzo FERNANDEZ scores for Argentina. The score moves to 1–1.
In the 2nd minute of second-half stoppage time, Lautaro MARTINEZ scores for Argentina. The score moves to 1–2.
In the 4th minute of second-half stoppage time, Rodrigo DE PAUL is shown a card for Argentina.
Between the 90th and 100th minutes, England drive a sustained spell: 1 shot and 22 dangerous actions.
At full-time, England 1–2 Argentina.
